creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
FreeBSD - recent STABLE (yesterday), ports from today. virtualbox-ose rebuilt from fresh newly updated ports after system was updated.

uname: FreeBSD bsdrookie.norma.com. 10.2-STABLE FreeBSD 10.2-STABLE #0 r290391: Fri Nov  6 11:27:47 YEKT 2015     emz@taiga:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/BSDROOKIE  amd64

virtualbox-ose-4.3.32
virtualbox-ose-kmod-4.3.32

kldload vboxdrv 

or

kldload vboxnetflt

causes immediate panic (100% reproducible, 4 attempts - 4 panics).
I have read that this may be related to nvidia kernel module - tried without it - also panics. I'm also using vt(4) cons driver (dont know if it's relevant).
